title_zh: 版本检查与后台更新提醒
title_en: Version checks and admin update notices
summary_zh: 新增版本元数据拉取、后台更新提醒、系统更新卡片和版本忽略机制。
summary_en: Adds version metadata checks, admin update notices, a system update panel, and ignore-version behavior.
upgrade_tip_zh: 建议升级前备份数据库与 uploads 目录。
upgrade_tip_en: Back up the database and uploads directory before upgrading.
